topics.title: Asymptotic Notation (Big-O, Ω, Θ)
topics.blurb: Definitions and reasoning about eventual upper/lower bounds up to constants.

topics.title: Solving Recurrences — Recursion Tree Method
topics.blurb: Visual method: sum the non-recursive work at each level plus the leaves.

topics.title: Solving Recurrences — Substitution + Induction
topics.blurb: Guess the bound, then prove it via strong induction on a concrete inequality.

topics.title: Divide and Conquer — Design Paradigm
topics.blurb: Divide, recurse, combine. Runtime recurrence comes directly from the steps.

topics.title: Dynamic Programming — 5-Step Template
topics.blurb: Define subproblem, write recurrence, prove optimal substructure, order, runtime.

topics.title: Merge Sort
topics.blurb: Classic D&C sort. Recurrence $T(n)=2T(n/2)+n$ gives $\Theta(n\log n)$.

topics.title: Median of Medians (Select)
topics.blurb: Deterministic $O(n)$ $i$-th order statistic via group-of-5 medians.

topics.title: Loop Invariants & Inductive Correctness
topics.blurb: Standard pattern: state invariant, prove base + maintenance + termination.

topics.title: Closest Pair of Points in the Plane
topics.blurb: $O(n\log n)$ D&C algorithm using the strip-and-15-neighbors trick.

topics.title: Karatsuba's Integer Multiplication
topics.blurb: Three recursive multiplications instead of four: $T(n)=3T(n/2)+n = \Theta(n^{\log_2 3})$.

topics.title: Longest Common Subsequence
topics.blurb: 2D DP on prefixes. Canonical example of exchange-argument correctness.

topics.title: Rod Cutting
topics.blurb: 1D DP on prefix length. Classic optimal-substructure example.

topics.title: Insertion Sort
topics.blurb: Reference iterative sort. $\Theta(n^2)$ worst case; canonical loop-invariant proof.

topics.title: Master Theorem (Reference)
topics.blurb: Closed-form for $T(n)=aT(n/b)+f(n)$. Optional; we solve via trees/induction instead.

topics.title: Log & Exponent Rules (Refresher)
topics.blurb: Change of base, product/quotient/power rules, common summations.
